# What type of PR is this? (check all applicable)
- [ ] Bug Fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Chore
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation Update
---
## Description
_Describe the purpose of this pull request and what changes it includes._

---
## Root Cause Analysis
_What caused the issue? Include the error message and stack trace reference._

---
## Changes Made
_List the file(s) modified and what was changed._

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| | |

---
## Testing
- [ ] Fix resolves the reported error
- [ ] No regressions introduced
- [ ] Existing tests pass

---
## Self-Review Checklist
- [ ] I have tested the changes introduced in this PR
- [ ] I have not introduced any unrelated changes
- [ ] Code follows existing style and conventions

---
## :white_check_mark: Merge Requirements
- At least **1 approval required** from a human reviewer
- :warning: **Auto-Triage Agent PRs are never self-merged** — a human must review and approve
- PR can be merged **only after**:
  - [ ] Root cause is validated
  - [ ] Fix is verified correct
  - [ ] No side effects introduced
